hero.title:
BEYOND
SQUARES
hero.desc: Driving the future of Egyptian innovation through a unified ecosystem of technology, classroom motivation, and medical excellence.

about.label: THE PARENT ENTITY
about.title: M Tech Square Group
about.p1: Establishing as a premier holding company in Port Said, M Tech Square Group unites five specialized entities under a singular vision of technological and educational excellence.
about.p2: We serve as the strategic umbrella that fosters growth across software development, digital marketing, vocational training for youth, and medical professional development.
about.p3: Our mission is to empower Egypt's next generation with the tools of tomorrow while providing world-class professional services to enterprises across the region.

2022.title: M Square
2022.desc: Connecting medical professionals with global knowledge through specialized international conferences.

2023.title: Techno Square
2023.desc: Egypt's pioneering tech education institute nurturing the next generation of innovators.

2024.title: Digital Studio Square
2024.desc: Our creative marketing arm established to amplify brand presence across digital channels.

2025.title: Code Square
2025.desc: Our flagship software house delivering bespoke enterprise and AI-powered mobile solutions.

ecosystem.title: OUR INNOVATION ECOSYSTEM
ecosystem.desc: A unified network of specialized entities driving excellence across digital, educational, and professional sectors.

techno.subtitle: Education Hub
techno.tagline: Inspiring the next generation of innovators
techno.integration: Trains emerging talent that directly feeds Code Square's development pipeline.

code.subtitle: Software Development
code.integration: Builds the digital products that Digital Studio markets and distributes.

digital.subtitle: Complete Agency
digital.integration: Amplifies reach for all group companies through premium marketing campaigns.

msquare.subtitle: Media & Events
msquare.integration: Delivers large-scale events and media that showcase the group's expertise.

step1.title: Educate
step1.desc: Techno Square trains emerging talent, building a foundation of logic and problem-solving.

step2.title: Develop
step2.desc: Code Square employs top talent to build robust software systems and mobile products.

step3.title: Market
step3.desc: Digital Studio takes the completed products and builds compelling market presence.

step4.title: Deliver
step4.desc: Online and M Square platforms distribute knowledge and solutions at scale globally.

footer.about_desc: Unified innovation ecosystem across education, technology, and healthcare sectors in Egypt.
footer.bottom_text: © 2026 M Tech Square Group. Engineered for excellence.

techno.name: Techno Square
techno.desc: Egypt's leading technology institute dedicated to nurturing young minds. We combine cutting-edge programming education with entrepreneurship training, preparing children for success in tomorrow's innovation economy.

online.name: Online
online.desc: Advanced e-learning ecosystem providing accessibility to top-tier expertise. Our platform hosts both live masterclasses and recorded certification paths, bridging the learning gap.

code.name: Code Square
code.desc: Premium software house delivering bespoke digital solutions. We specialize in mobile applications, enterprise software, and cloud systems. Innovation at the core of every line of code.

msquare.name: M Square
msquare.desc: Medical conference experts, providing high-quality training and events that bridge medical professionals with global knowledge. Hosting with internationally certified accreditation.

digital.name: Digital Studio
digital.desc: Creative marketing agency blending data-driven strategies with premium design aesthetics. We build brands that resonate in the digital age, narrating your unique story.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and let's create something extraordinary together.

seo.title: M Tech Square Group - Unified Innovation Ecosystem
seo.description: Unified innovation ecosystem across education, technology, and healthcare sectors in Egypt. Join our journey of excellence.
